message:
fix(polyfills): fix QuickJS GC assertion failure in assert.zig

Root cause: strict_obj was consumed by JS_SetPropertyStr but then
reused on subsequent lines without JS_DupValue, causing a use-after-
consume error that triggered GC assertion: (p->ref_count > 0).

Changes:
- assert.zig: DupValue strict_obj before first SetPropertyStr, add
  cleanup in else branch when _modules is undefined
- console.zig: Fix consoleDir to free JS_NewInt32 after JS_Call,
  add clarifying comments about SetPropertyStr ownership
- runtime.js: Remove duplicate Promise.prototype.then hijack,
  fix module.exports circular reference, make console configurable
